lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been regularly maintained. The interior and exterior show minor signs of normal wear, but there are no major defects.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some minor scratches and visible surface wear. The interior shows moderate use with noticeable wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance soon.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior features some paint fading on the hood and roof, accompanied by various surface scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger-side door. Inside, the cabin is intact but the upholstery exhibits noticeable wear and some staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives daily, though it is due for a set of new tires and the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was. It serves as a reliable transportation option for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

Experience the joy of driving a vehicle that looks and feels like it just rolled off the assembly line! This car is in truly mint condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that is still fresh and immaculate. It has been meticulously maintained to the highest standard, ensuring a smooth and reliable ride. This is a rare find for anyone seeking perfection!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. Mechanically, it is solid; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and it has no known leaks or urgent repair needs. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with only minor signs of use, and all electronics and climate controls are fully operational. On the exterior, the paint remains in great shape, showing only a few small stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with careful ownership. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that is ready for its next owner.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that balances refined performance with proven reliability. This well-maintained unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a superior driving experience, it stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and enduring quality. This represents an exceptional opportunity for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile that maintains a commanding presence on the road.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next big adventure? This car has been super well-cared for and is in really solid shape! It runs like a dream and looks great too. I’ve loved driving it, and I know you will too. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways—come check it out!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) represents a well-maintained example of the S54B32 powerplant, featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission to a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been prioritized, including rear subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement. The chassis dynamics are enhanced by a refreshed suspension setup featuring Bilstein dampers and poly-bushings for improved turn-in precision. While the aesthetics show honest patina associated with spirited use, the mechanical synchronization and drivetrain rigidity remain robust, offering the quintessential high-revving analog experience enthusiasts demand.
Used car in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and modern comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the smoke-free interior is in excellent shape with firm seating bolsters and pristine carpeting. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts smoothly, thanks to a documented history of on-time oil changes and scheduled maintenance. Recent service includes a fresh brake inspection and a new set of all-season tires with deep tread remaining. Equipped with a premium sound system, dual-zone climate control, and a suite of safety features, this car is ready for its next owner with no immediate repairs needed. It comes with a clean title and all original owner’s manuals.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, characterized by its mechanical soundness and well-preserved exterior. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, the automobile offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. It stands as a testament to responsible ownership and rigorous upkeep, providing a sophisticated driving experience without compromise.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which has been meticulously maintained to ensure both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of refined luxury and dependable performance. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, it remains in commendable condition and is prepared for immediate delivery. Experience the assurance of quality and the prestige of ownership with this exceptional offering.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my ride. I’ve absolutely loved driving this car, and it’s still in such wonderful shape! It’s been super reliable, runs like a dream, and has been really well-cared for over the years. If you’re looking for a solid, dependable vehicle that’s ready for many more miles of adventures, you’ve found it! I'm excited for it to go to a great new home, so feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Used car. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. No accidents.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience, blending refined performance with lasting comfort. The exterior showcases a vibrant finish with only minor, superficial stone chips consistent with careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and true. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and odor-free; the upholstery is well-preserved with no cracks or tears, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. With a fresh set of tires and recent brake service, this car is prepared for the long haul and represents a fantastic value for a discerning buyer looking for quality without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards align with our professional criteria. It remains a premier choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes proven reliability and a refined driving experience. Secure a high-caliber automobile that has been preserved with consistent care.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this offering represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking both long-term value and operational excellence.

Hey there! I’m parting with my reliable ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. She’s in really solid shape, well-loved, and totally ready for her next big adventure! Everything runs smoothly, and I’ve made sure she's been well-cared for so you can just hop in and enjoy the road. It's the perfect find if you're looking for something dependable and great-looking. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains precise, with recent valve adjustments and a verified VANOS service. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from upgraded
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Well-maintained interior.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers the perfect blend of performance and sophistication. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear expected of a vehicle that has been loved and driven. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while the cabin retains that signature fresh scent, having never been smoked in. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has undergone regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance, ensuring the turbocharged engine delivers a smooth, responsive ride. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide confident stopping power. This is a reliable, high-quality vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy the open road without compromise.

This distinguished vehicle offers a compelling synthesis of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior condition, it serves as a testament to engineering longevity. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and operational excellence. Acquire a vehicle that exemplifies quality craftsmanship and enduring value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been treated with love? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it’s in really great shape! It runs smoothly, looks sharp, and has plenty of life left in it. It's been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep up with the maintenance so it's ready for its next adventure. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend road trips—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual and a limited-slip differential, providing exceptional power delivery. Mechanical highlights include a recently addressed subframe reinforcement and a refreshed cooling system. Equipped with a firm suspension and precise rack-and-pinion steering, this chassis remains balanced and communicative. It presents in honest condition with minor cosmetic wear, offering a mechanically sound platform for the purist driver.
Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Interior is well-kept. Engine runs smooth. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort, featuring premium leather seating that shows minimal aging and a suite of fully functional technology. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The tires have ample tread, and the brakes are responsive. Whether you're commuting or taking a weekend getaway, this car provides a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. It’s a solid, honest example of a well-loved vehicle ready for its next chapter.

This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality and reliability. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it delivers the dependable performance expected from a premium pre-owned selection.
